claim_boundary: CAD-side objective acceptance for the complete phone. This joins the board end-to-end readiness matrix with mechanical CAD release gates; planning artifacts, concept KiCad geometry, blank templates, and CAD envelopes do not count as finished phone evidence.

why: at least one objective requirement remains blocked
current KiCad PCB is a concept scaffold with placeholder footprints and no routed copper
live KiCad PCB audit confirms nets/classes/placeholders exist but routed copper, zones, DRC, and production outputs are absent
live KiCad utilization audit finds placeholder courtyard intrusions into the battery window and reserve pressure remains below routed-release target
supplier pinouts, footprints, STEP models, routed DRC/ERC, SI/PI, RF, thermal, factory, and enclosure evidence are missing
enclosure fit execution package requires routed-board STEP, supplier 3D models, boolean-interference clearance, physical fit logs, and measured clearance cases

board_cases.requirement: Optimize device and board size around a popular/easy 5.5 inch 1080x1920 MIPI CTP display.
blockers: display supplier signed 2D drawing, FPC pinout, connector MPN, panel init sequence, touch-controller data, and STEP model missing
rear and front camera drawings, exact FPC pinouts, mating connector MPNs, STEP models, driver notes, and calibration data missing
routed MIPI DSI/CSI length-skew, impedance, return-path, and DRC evidence missing
display bring-up, touch probe, V4L2 or Android Camera HAL capture, and image-quality logs missing
routed-board STEP clearance for display FPC bend, camera lens stack, earpiece, cover glass, and enclosure datums missing

board_cases.requirement: Use Alibaba/Made-in-China display and camera OEM sourcing evidence and require supplier packs before freeze.
blockers: display supplier signed 2D drawing, FPC pinout, connector MPN, panel init sequence, touch-controller data, and STEP model missing
rear and front camera drawings, exact FPC pinouts, mating connector MPNs, STEP models, driver notes, and calibration data missing
routed MIPI DSI/CSI length-skew, impedance, return-path, and DRC evidence missing
display bring-up, touch probe, V4L2 or Android Camera HAL capture, and image-quality logs missing
routed-board STEP clearance for display FPC bend, camera lens stack, earpiece, cover glass, and enclosure datums missing

board_cases.requirement: Review and wire one USB-C port, USB-PD, charger, power button, and volume buttons.
blockers: USB-C receptacle drawing, land pattern, shell load path, ESD, and STEP evidence missing
USB-PD controller firmware, CC attach, dead-battery boot, PPS, and Type-C class logs missing
charger CC/CV cycle, NTC/pack-ID readback, JEITA, current-limit, and surge validation missing
side-key flex or switch drawing, force/travel, ESD, wake, and recovery-combo evidence missing
routed schematic, ERC, routed PCB, DRC, SI/PI, and enclosure clearance rerun missing

board_cases.requirement: Use easy-to-acquire off-the-shelf cellular, Wi-Fi, and Bluetooth modules and wire host/RF contracts.
blockers: cellular module region SKU, band matrix, hardware design guide, STEP, RF feed rules, and SIM/eSIM path are missing
Wi-Fi/Bluetooth footprint, firmware/NVRAM/CLM, license, country-code, and modular approval scope are missing
routed RF feed geometry, matching networks, via fences, shields, and conducted access are missing
VNA, conducted RF, coexistence, GNSS desense, SAR pre-scan, and carrier/PTCRB/GCF evidence are missing
factory RF calibration procedure, test limits, and first-article transcript are missing
Android/Linux cellular, Wi-Fi, and Bluetooth bring-up logs are missing

board_cases.requirement: Optimize board size, wasted space, route density, power efficiency, thermal, RF, and factory-test access.
blockers: supplier footprints and final courtyards are not loaded
routed courtyard utilization and escape-density reports are missing
routed board STEP and selected battery swelling envelope clearance are missing
routed KiCad PCB, DRC, filled zones, and post-route reports are missing
real supplier footprints, courtyards, and STEP models are missing
routed-courtyard utilization and escape-density reports are missing
SI/PI, power efficiency, thermal soak, RF, coexistence, and SAR evidence are missing
routed board STEP and formal enclosure tolerance stack are missing
factory probe coordinates, limits, and first-article transcript are missing

board_cases.requirement: Convert supplier evidence into frozen KiCad symbols, footprints, pinouts, and 3D model bindings.
blockers: RFQ transmittal packages have not been sent and archived
supplier RFQ response packs are missing
pinout review signoffs are missing
symbol review signoffs are missing
footprint review signoffs are missing
footprint-to-3D-model bindings are missing
sample inspection and compliance packs are missing

board_cases.requirement: Finish the PCB end-to-end with real schematic, routed KiCad board, ERC, DRC, SI/PI, and post-route reports.
blockers: all E1Phone:* footprints are non-release placeholders excluded from BOM and position files
no routed copper segments or filled zones are present in the KiCad PCB
supplier connector/module land patterns and STEP models have not replaced placeholders
DRC, ERC, SI/PI, RF, fabrication, assembly, and routed enclosure clearance evidence are missing
supplier pinouts, footprints, mating connector data, and STEP models are not frozen
KiCad schematic remains scaffold text and has no ERC release report
current PCB has placeholder footprints, no routed tracks, and no filled zones
route feasibility and escape density are not proven with supplier footprints and a trial route
module host integration closure is blocked on supplier pinouts, real schematic capture, routed host interfaces, firmware, RF, and bring-up evidence
external interface design review is blocked on supplier drawings, routed STEP clearance, and measured USB-C, display, camera, and side-key validation
enclosure tolerance stack closure is blocked until routed board STEP, supplier geometry, GD&T, lifecycle, environmental, and interference evidence exist
schematic-symbol-footprint closure is blocked until real KiCad symbols, supplier footprints, pinout signoff, 3D model binding, and ERC evidence exist
board optimization scorecard remains blocked until routed utilization, power/thermal, RF, factory-test, and enclosure evidence exist
power sequence bring-up closure is blocked until first-power, rail scope, charger, regulator, firmware, and thermal evidence exist
RF antenna coexistence closure is blocked until tuned feeds, VNA, conducted RF, coexistence, firmware/regulatory, carrier, and SAR evidence exist
fabricator stackup and impedance coupon geometry are not selected
production Gerber or IPC-2581, drill, position, BOM/AVL, assembly drawing, and STEP outputs are missing
routed board STEP has not been imported into mechanical CAD for enclosure clearance rerun
post-route SI/PI/RF/power/thermal and factory first-article evidence is missing

board_cases.requirement: Prove the routed PCB with final component heights can be placed inside the enclosure.
blockers: supplier STEP/B-rep models for display, USB-C, cameras, buttons, radios, audio, haptics, and enclosure tooling are missing
routed KiCad board STEP with component 3D models is missing
routed-board clearance rerun has not passed
concept STEP envelopes are not supplier-approved geometry
full CAD boolean interference report using routed board and supplier models is missing
component height and courtyard data are not bound to production KiCad footprints
routed KiCad PCB and DRC report are missing
supplier STEP or B-rep models for height-critical parts are missing
routed board STEP has not been exported or imported into enclosure CAD
routed-board clearance, boolean interference, and physical fit results are missing
display, USB-C, side-key, camera, radio, battery, acoustic, and interconnect functional evidence is missing

board_cases.requirement: Produce manufacturing outputs, BOM/AVL, assembly data, factory probe limits, and first-article evidence.
blockers: routed KiCad PCB
Gerber X2 or IPC-2581
drill files
pick-and-place
BOM
STEP
DFM/DFA
fab quote
first article
split-board interconnect continuity and assembly inspection

release_rule: Every board objective requirement and every mechanical gate must pass, the board end-to-end release decision must be true, and all required release outputs must exist before claiming the finished phone is end-to-end ready.
